channel.title: Serenity News Briefing
channel.description: Curated news briefings — Iran/war, AI/ML, fintech, NYC politics.

item.title: BREAKING: Israel "Broad Wave" of New Strikes; Trump Says "Time to Make a Deal"
item.description:
Israel launches fresh "broad wave" of strikes on Iran. Trump simultaneously calls for a deal — notable pivot combining military escalation with diplomatic signaling. Iranians tell BBC "it's getting worse every day." Nuclear deal explainers resurface. Key shift: strikes may be leverage for negotiations, not regime change.

Sources: BBC News. 2026-03-05.

item.title: ESCALATION: Israel Hits Tehran Security HQ; Iran Strikes US Sites Dubai/Qatar
item.description: Israel attacks security HQ across Tehran. Iran retaliates — drone fire at US consulate Dubai, missile on US base Qatar. Mission targeting supreme leader revealed. US sending evacuation planes. Hezbollah drags Lebanon in. Tehran food shortages. Markets day 3 slump.

item.title: March 4 AM: Iran 1,000+ Dead; 6 US KIA; Markets Day 3
item.description: Iran civilian toll passes 1,000. All 6 US KIA identified. Gulf states "all red lines crossed." Hormuz standoff. TikTok refuses E2E encryption. OpenAI military deal updated.

item.title: March 3: Iran Strikes Begin — First US Combat Deaths
item.description: US-Israel launch strikes on Iran. Civilian toll climbs to 787+. First US soldiers killed in Kuwait. Gulf states hit by retaliation.
